Adds the Progressive Disclosure Self-Repair Skill (formerly healthcheck) to embed programmatic system recovery into the Agent OS.

### Enhancements
- Shifts paradigm from passive health tracking to active `self-repair`.
- Enforces daemon checks via specific `package.json` scripts (`npm run ai:server`, `npm run ai:server-memory`, `npm run ai:server-neural-link`).
- Instructs agents to bypass MCP boundaries natively via `ai/services.mjs` or `ai/examples/` to programmatically resolve backend deadlocks.
- Instructs swarm intelligence to terminate zombie processes if ports (8000/8001) are locked.

Resolves #10018
